pi_items.metadata_value: Not declared in metadata (task.json has no metadata field)
pi_items.verified_value: Unsplash public images: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4 (primary) and https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1447752875215-b2761acb3c5d (fallback), with fallback to synthetic image if downloads fail
Primary image: 800x533 RGB, ~39.6KB, with saturation-50 and contrast-30 adjustments applied in URL. Real Unsplash photo verified accessible (HTTP 200)
pi_items.source: URL inspection and curl verification of https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=60&sat=-50&con=-30

pi_items.verified_value: Use GIMP's Colors→Auto→Color Enhance filter to improve color distribution and vibrancy
pi_items.source: Task description in task.json and setup instructions in setup_enhance_task.sh (lines 38-43)

pi_items.verified_value: Saturation must increase by ≥5%, histogram distribution must improve (std dev increase ≥5%), color richness must increase ≥10%, clipping <5%, and at least 3 of 4 criteria must pass for success (≥75% score)
pi_items.source: Code analysis of verifier.py (lines 182-290), specifically criteria at lines 257-279

privileged_info_summary: The color_enhance task uses real Unsplash images (URLs verified as accessible) rather than synthetic data. Primary image is 800x533 pixels with pre-applied desaturation (sat=-50, con=-30) to create a flat/underexposed baseline. Task requires using GIMP's Color Enhance filter to improve saturation, distribution, and vibrancy. Verification checks that saturation increases ≥5%, histogram std dev improves, color richness increases ≥10%, and excessive clipping is avoided. Success requires ≥3 of 4 criteria met within 60 seconds and 5 steps.
